summary: Verified cargo-info block on inscricao-edital-04.html and inscricao-edital-02.html. Dropdown #CMB_Cargo is selectable (click blocker only targets <a>). On initial load with value '-1' the block [data-testid=cargo-info] is hidden (display:none) with empty content. Selecting COD 04101 renders block with all expected fields (Localidade contains 'Araguaína/TO', Escolaridade 'ENSINO SUPERIOR', Remuneração 'R$ 5.000,00', Vagas '5', Vagas PCD '1', Cadastro reserva '5', Taxa 'R$ 160,00'). Switching to COD 04102 updates the block (Remuneração 'R$ 7.000,00'). Resetting to '--Selecione--' hides the block again. On edital-02, COD 02300 renders correctly with Remuneração 'R$ 3.107,57' and Taxa 'R$ 115,00'.
critical_code_review_comments: Cargo info block uses computed style display 'block'/'none' correctly and rebuilds innerHTML per change; no XSS since values are HTML-escaped via textContent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: cargo-info feature verified working on both edital-04 (8 options incl. -1) and edital-02 (1 option + -1). Option value attributes are internal IDs (e.g., 16311); COD extraction uses option.textContent match on /COD\s*(\d+)/, so use select_option by value=<internal id> when scripting.
